description: Unique identifier for each house record
Living area of the house in square feet
Number of bedrooms in the house
Number of bathrooms (fractional values indicate half-baths)
Number of floors/stories in the house
Year the house was originally built
Age of the house in years (as of reference year)
Total lot size in square feet
Name of the neighborhood/area where the house is located
Whether the house has a pool (1 = yes 0 = no)
Whether the house has been renovated (1 = yes 0 = no)
Overall condition rating of the house on a scale (e.g. 1-5)
Distance from the house to the city center in kilometers
Sale/listing price of the house in dollars (target variable)
